latest.title: Monkeys on cliffs don't slip like you think
latest.script_key: these guys aren t just standing on the cliff edge they re hooking their fingers into cracks like tiny pitons that s why they don t slip even when the mist gets slippery i love watching them test each foothold before they trust it what would you grab first

latest.title: Dogs survive winter coats their owners get wrong
latest.script_key: puppies can t freeze in snow look how fast they shake off ice that s not fur keeping them warm it s how they move heat away from their skin their fur traps a layer of air that acts like a furnace that s why they can nap outside in subzero temps without blankets

latest.title: Frost on trees isn’t just pretty it’s a survival trick
latest.script_key: these trees wear armor see the frost clinging to the bark it s not decoration that s a thermal blanket the branches trap cold air inside so sap keeps moving that s why the tree doesn t freeze solid i always thought frost was just decoration did you learn this wrong too

latest.title: Gray langurs climb pine trees like pros
latest.script_key: gray langurs own pine trees watch those fingers wrap around pine bark like it s nothing that s because their thumbs got the longest grip of any monkey that s why they can crash through a pine canopy like it s a jungle gym would you climb this high with gloves on

latest.title: French bulldog puppies break a myth about snoring
